text: I find myself in a space dedicated to research and development—a laboratory of ideas embodied in color and glass. The transparent walls suggest openness, while the displays inside speak to the collaboration between human curiosity and technology. I feel the thrill of potential discoveries, mixed with a quiet wonder at how creativity is fostered here. The environment is structured, yet humming with an undercurrent of possibility. I am both observer and participant in the ongoing dance of inquiry.
